summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Luxe Design Studio iteration 2 - glassmorphism styling override with hover tooltip functionality. All core features working perfectly including AI image generation, glassmorphism effects, hover tooltips, angle selection modal, and navigation.

ui_bugs.issue: Tooltip doesn't disappear immediately when mouse leaves the card

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint responds correctly
AI image generation with simple prompts works (Gemini Nano Banana API)
AI image generation with filters (function_type/space) works
AI image generation with reference images works
PDF download functionality works
PPT download functionality works
GET /api/templates endpoint returns template list
Landing page loads with Fairmont hotel background and co-branded logos (Fairmont X LoversAI)
CTA 'Design Your Vision' button navigates to /studio
Studio page shows hotel image through all glass panels with proper backdrop-filter blur effects
Sidebar glass styling: backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(1.4)
Top bar glass styling: backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(1.3)
Canvas glass styling: backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(1.4)
Hovering over Space card (Grand Ballroom) shows glassmorphic thumbnail tooltip adjacent to sidebar
Hovering over Event Type card (Fashion Show) shows glassmorphic thumbnail tooltip
Clicking a Space card opens angle selection modal with frosted glass styling
Angle modal shows carousel of 4 views (Front, Left, Right, Stage/Aerial/Panoramic)
Modal glass styling: backdrop-filter: blur(32px) saturate(1.4)
Selecting an angle and confirming feeds data into active filters (3 active filters displayed)
Prompt input and Generate button functionality works
Real AI image generation completes successfully with loading indicators
Download button appears after image generation
Templates page loads at /templates with glassmorphism design
Template cards display with download buttons for different categories
Navigation buttons work (Back to Home, Go to Templates, Back navigation)
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (7/7 tests passed), Frontend: 96% (24/25 tests passed - minor tooltip persistence issue)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Tooltip should disappear immediately when mouse leaves the card. Currently tooltip persists briefly after mouse leaves.
